name: opl-flow
description: OPL Flow installs a minimal Codex preference profile and a bounded concurrent-task coordination skill.

interface.longDescription: OPL Flow packages a minimal AGENTS.md preference profile, RTK and CodeGraph guidance, plus bounded multi-task coordination with user-approved archival.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use OPL Flow to install or diagnose the profile, or coordinate concurrent Codex tasks safely.
